items.summary: Replace universe endpoint in safeFetch base configuration from https://api.binance.com to https://fapi.binance.com for Futures API access
Update fetchUniverse24h function in binanceApi.ts to call https://fapi.binance.com/fapi/v1/ticker/24hr endpoint for Futures USDT-M perpetual contracts
Modify universeFilter.ts to filter universe to ONLY symbols ending with 'USDT' and explicitly exclude all symbols containing 'USDC' (case-insensitive check on the full symbol string)

Add validation in universeFilter.ts to exclude stable-to-stable pairs by checking if base asset (symbol without 'USDT' suffix) matches any stablecoin identifier: USDC, BUSD, TUSD, FDUSD, USDP, DAI, UST, PAX, USD1 (case-insensitive)
Update universeFilter.ts to parse quoteVolume using Number(item.quoteVolume) and apply volume threshold filter (>= 5,000,000) AFTER proper numeric conversion
Add UNIVERSE_SOURCE log event immediately when fetchUniverse24h is called, with payload containing { source: 'FUTURES_USDTM', endpoint: '/fapi/v1/ticker/24hr' }

Update universeFilter.ts fallback logic to apply same USDT-only, no-USDC, no-stable/stable filters when filtered.length === 0, then sort by quoteVolume descending and return exactly top 5 symbols (not 20)
Add UNIVERSE_SOURCE to LogEntry type union in frontend/src/types/store.ts
Update LogsTab.tsx to display UNIVERSE_SOURCE log event type with default color coding (not red or yellow)
